# render-detail

Renders the routes facet as a section in the plugin detail pane: a flat list of
the plugin's HTTP/WS routes with method-colored badges and path, tagged by
runtime (server/central), plus an "Endpoint callers" banner listing the plugins
that call this plugin's endpoints (from the `endpointCallers` reverse index).
Reads `node.facets["routes"]` directly.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-plugin routes section in the plugin detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginViewSlots.Section` "routes" → `RoutesDetailSection`
  - Uses: `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginLink`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginNode`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginViewSlots`, `plugin-meta/plugin-view.Section`, `primitives/css/cluster.Cluster`, `primitives/css/inline.Inline`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
